_comment: Real-shape mcp-proxy /call response for openagentic_prometheus.prometheus_query with query='up == 0' when ALL TARGETS ARE UP (operational default in a stable cluster). The python tool returns the formatted-text header with Results: 0 and no per-line entries. FastMCP wraps the string return as content[{type:'text', text: <string>}]. This is the empty-case fixture — the downstream analyze transform parses the text, finds zero down targets, the report explicitly renders an 'All N targets up' banner instead of a blank table.

content.text:
Query: up == 0
Result Type: vector
Results: 0
